edgeCases: Scenario-name normalization: trim, collapse spaces, strip one trailing period, lowercase
Scenario Outline counted once for matching
Acceptance header trailing annotation (AC4, AC5) ignored after filename
Scenario comment with no Acceptance header above it is ignored
No spec files in scope skips the gate
Warn severity reports gaps without failing; fail blocks
Diff-aware scope excludes unchanged spec files
Unknown severity value rejected at config load
Malformed/scenario-less .feature and non-.go files tolerated; dir-read errors fail
